commentary_text: The model favors Panama at 66%, while the sportsbook consensus favors Ghana at 46%—a 35-percentage-point gap on the Ghana win probability in opposite directions. This wide disagreement could reflect market access to recent lineup changes, injury news, or recent form data unavailable to the model's last update. The model's much heavier lean toward Panama suggests its Elo-based foundation may be anchored to older strength assessments. The dashboard surfaces this as a genuine signal of divergence rather than a judgment on which framework is more reliable.
